    def eligible_for_study_grant(self) -> bool:
        return (
            self.gender in ['female', 'non-binary', 'transgender'] and
            self.age >= 30 and
            self.race in ['black', 'hispanic', 'indian'] and
            self.employment_status in ['unemployed', 'student'] and
            self.education in ['high school', 'college'] and
            self.marital_status in ['single', 'divorced', 'legally separated'] and
            self.religion != 'christianity' and
            self.GPA >= 3.5 and
            self.financial_need == 'high'
        )
